narrative:
Troy Township has 1,629 registered voters, with 56.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 29.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 15.1 percentage points.
